diagrams.title: Orthogonal Projection onto a Line
diagrams.description: Shows vector v being projected onto line spanned by u, with perpendicular error vector
diagrams.purpose: Understanding geometric meaning of orthogonal projection and the perpendicularity condition.

diagrams.title: Projection onto Plane in R³
diagrams.description: Vector projection onto a plane with normal vector n
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing projections in higher dimensions and the formula P = I - (nnᵀ)/(nᵀn).

diagrams.title: Least Squares Geometric Interpretation
diagrams.description: Projection interpretation of least squares solution
diagrams.purpose: Understanding why least squares finds the projection onto the column space.

diagrams.title: Projection Matrix Eigenvalues
diagrams.description: Visualization of how projection matrix acts on its range and null space
diagrams.purpose: Understanding spectral properties of projection matrices.
